content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from slovenian to english:
Poljski smučar z okvaro vida Maciej Krezel in spremljevalka Anna Ogarzynska sta bila trinajsta v superveleslalomu. Južnokorejski Jong Seork Park je bil štiriindvajseti v sedečem superveleslalomu.
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

As a linguistic expert, I am happy to assist you with this translation. Here is the English version of the text provided:

### Polish visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and his guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the super-G. South Korean Jong Seork Park was twenty-fourth in the sitting super-G. ###
